text:
わしはいままで、クラフトの技術訓練と
ともに、お主に刀匠としての考え方を
伝えてきたつもりじゃ。

説教臭く聞こえていたら、すまんのう。
まあ、レギアスの影響と思って
許して欲しい。

しかし、話していると、どうだ。
わしの心まで、若かりし頃に
戻ったかのようじゃ。

この情熱の発散もかねて、お主に
ひとつ、ご褒美を用意しようと思う。

だがその前に、わしの出す課題を
こなしてきて欲しい。
その達成が、交

Up until now, I've been trying to teach you how
to think as a weaponsmith while also training
you in Crafting.

If those lessons came across as me preaching
to you, I apologize. Just think of it as Regius's
influence on me and show me
some forgiveness.

However, in speaking with you, I've felt
as though my heart has also somehow
returned to my younger days.

Allow me to present you with a reward, as an
extension of that passion.

But before that, I'd like you to accomplish
the task I give you. That'll be the terms of
our exchange.
